data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of showing full availability to preferred clients, but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions an override option but does not provide concrete evidence of its implementation or how it operates in practice. This indicates a gap in the functionality as the requirement is not covered by the existing evidence.
gaps: No evidence of an implemented override option for preferred clients to show full availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
